## Description
Provide a brief description of the changes in this Pull Request.

## Related Issues
Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change
Please delete options that are not relevant.
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Quantitative update (changes to math, models, or Greeks)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand quantitative areas.
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if applicable.
- [ ] My changes generate no new errors or warnings (e.g., data quality score is unaffected).
